  1. Unnamed Package
Contents
  1. Description
  2. Classes and Interfaces

Unnamed Package

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CashierView
    CashierView displays the cashier POS GUI.
    Database
    Database class handles connection to PSQL database Sets up the credentials for easy connection Requires the follow info: - url - userf
    Employee
    Represents a row element in the Employees table.
    Employees
    Object Representing the entirety of the database's Employees.
    EmployeesPanel
    Employee management panel used in the manager view.
    Inventory
    Initializes object representing Inventory table in the database
    InventoryPanel
    Panel for displaying and managing inventory items.
    Main
    The Main class represents the initial GUI window of the application.
    ManagerReport
    The ManagerReport class represents the manager analytics and reporting panel.
    ManagerView
    Main manager window for the POS system.
    Menu
    Item initialized to the data held at the Menu table in the database.
    MenuItem
    Representation of one row of the Menu table in the database.
    MenuManager
    The MenuManager class handles database operations related to menu items and toppings.
    MenuManagerPanel
    Panel for viewing and managing menu items and toppings.
    Order
    Represents a row to be inserted into the Orders table.
    OrderItem
    Represents one row to be inserted in the Order_Items table.
    OrderTopping
    Represents a row to be inserted on the Order_Item_Toppings table in the databse
    ProductUsage
    Represents product usage data for inventory tracking.
    ProductUsageDAO
    Data access object for retrieving product usage information from the database.
    ProductUsagePanel
    Panel for viewing product usage reports.
    SalesReport
    Panel for which generates a SalesReport creates a JPanel which shows a table allowing you to search for order values from 2 different time periods
    StockItem
    Stores data meant to represent an inventory item's following traits Item Id Item name Stock Quantintyt Current Active status
    ToppingItem
    Stores data meant to represenet a row in the Toppings table Topping Id Topping name Topping Price Current Active status
    Toppings
    Represents the entirety of the Inventory table
    XReportDAO
    Database communication object.
    XReportPanel
    Constructs the display panel housing the XReport.
    ZReport
    Holds the following top sales data for a given hour: Total Product Sales Total Topping Sales Total Sales Most Popular Product Most Popular Topping
    ZReportDAO
    Contains specialized methods to communicated with the database and generate ZReport entries.
    ZReportPanel
    Constructs the JPanel to display the ZReport data within the ManagerView Reports tab
